target_field: geophysical fluid dynamics (atmospheric and oceanic waves)
shared_mechanism: bulk-boundary correspondence: a nonzero integer (Chern number) of a gapped band structure over momentum/parameter space forces a quantized number of unidirectional chiral edge modes at a boundary
brief_reason: Equatorial Kelvin and Yanai waves are topologically protected, unidirectional boundary modes whose existence and count are fixed by the Chern number of the shallow-water/Coriolis band structure, exactly as the spectral Chern number ν in Kitaev's free-fermion model governs the chiral edge (thermal transport) modes via the same bulk-boundary correspondence.
